title: SSL Protocol Error when setting Google Sheets credentials
symptom: When attempting to set Google Sheets credentials, n8n displays 'ERR_SSL_PROTOCOL_ERROR' indicating a secure connection issue.
applies_when: Attempting to configure Google Sheets credentials
root_cause: The error occurs when the SSL certificate is not properly configured on the server, leading to an inability to establish a secure HTTPS connection. This can happen if the certificate is missing, expired, or incorrectly set up in the web server configuration.
fix_steps: Ensure that an SSL certificate is installed on your VPS using nginx or caddy.
Configure your web server to redirect HTTP traffic to HTTPS.
Add the callback URL in your Google OAuth settings.
Add your domain as a trusted domain in the Google Cloud Console App.
agent_instruction: Configure the SSL certificate on your VPS and update your Google Cloud settings accordingly.
